releaseNotes: v0.24.16 — Five improvements from Alex's testing. (1) Sync stall fix: scans that landed during an in-flight sync no longer wait for the next 30-second poll to push — they re-trigger the drain immediately. (2) Sync Diagnostics device roster now shows only ACTIVE devices (revoked-but-not-yet-cleaned-up entries are filtered out — fixed both server-side and in display). (3) Sync support bundle export now offers Save-to-phone in addition to Share. (4) Camera scanner has a brief framing delay (1 second) and a yellow 'Framing...' indicator on entry so you have time to point at the right barcode. (5) Cycle count: when you scan a NEW bottle missing the drug name, dose, or expiration date, the edit dialog now pops automatically so you can fill those in before moving on.
